name: semia-audit
description: Representation Synthesis workflow for auditing agent skills in Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Audit agent skills with Semia SDL V2.
interface.longDescription: Runs a plugin-first Semia workflow where Codex performs Stage 2 evidence-backed SDL extraction and deterministic Semia tools prepare, validate, detect, and report findings.
defaultPrompt: Run Semia audit on this skill
Audit this plugin for SDL V2 risks
